Web Design Services

Triton.net has been providing web design services in Grand Rapids, MI since the dawn of the internet. At Triton, we not only concentrate on initial design, we also anticipate your site's future expansion.

We know goals and directions change. For this reason, at any time, we work with customers to upgrade and add on applications that can better accomplish your goals and expand your business.

Triton Services

High Efficiency Lighting

Energy-saving LED lighting solutions designed to reduce overhead costs and improve the quality of light in your facility.

Energy Rebate Program

We help you identify and apply for available utility rebate programs so you can maximize savings on energy-efficient upgrades.

Grower Assist

Specialized support and technology solutions tailored for growers — helping streamline operations and improve yield outcomes.

NVR Camera Systems

Professional network video recorder camera systems for reliable, high-definition security coverage of your property.
